title: Cascade raises $3.5M to spot construction projects before the bid exists
summary: Tim Johannesson, a principal at the luxury architecture firm Smallwood, said Cascade helped his firm find and win a $6 million project he would not otherwise have seen. “I’ve been in the industry for 30 years,” he said. “A project broke ground…
